summary: The change is documentation-only and accurately preserves the implemented scope: general fractional/scientific xsd:double parsing remains deferred, the existing integer-valued fragment is explicitly identified, and no affordability or external-audit claim is made. The proposed future approach acknowledges the required lexical binding, exact round-to-nearest-even interval verification, constraint measurement, and pending external audit. No executable behavior, test logic, dependency state, or security boundary changes in this diff.
